description_long: This is a robust metal gate flanked by two large, rectangular stone pillars. The gate features vertical bars topped with pointed spear-like finials, providing both security and a decorative touch. One section of the gate appears to be a swinging door, while the other is a fixed panel, both anchored between the pillars. The lower portion of the swinging section is reinforced with a solid metal plate, adding strength and preventing passage at ground level. The entire structure is finished in a dark, matte color, giving it a classic and imposing appearance suitable for urban or residential entryways. The design emphasizes both functionality and deterrence, with its sharp finials and solid construction.
description: A dark metal gate with pointed finials, set between two large stone pillars, featuring a swinging door and reinforced lower panel.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both the swinging gate section and the fixed panel, with prominent stone pillars and pointed finials.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the stone pillar and the alignment of the vertical bars.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the gate, the solid lower panel, and the arrangement of the pillars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other stone pillar and the spear-tipped bars.
